tagline: Engineering full-stack platforms — web, mobile, and backend — across enterprise FMCG commerce, government programs, and consumer startups. Processing billions of rupiah in daily transactions, reaching millions of users.
bio: I'm a full-stack engineer with six years of practice shipping production systems — frontend, backend, and mobile — for fintech, government, FMCG and education platforms across Indonesia.

Currently leading engineering at Diamond Food Indonesia — modernising B2B commerce that processes billions of rupiah in daily transactions. Previously contributed to GovTech Edu at Telkom Indonesia, building tools used inside the Ministry of Education.
